title: The Brigand's Tongue
target: wring the location of the bandit cache out of the prisoner before dawn

contributions.line: Marek grips the prisoner’s collar, voice low and steady, pressing him to break before dawn.
Veska watches the prisoner’s eyes, catching the flicker of doubt and contradiction in his story.

outcomeNarrative: Marek's physical pressure and Veska's sharp eye expose enough lies to crack the prisoner’s composure; he finally reveals the bandit cache's location.
